MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHINE, MIKE DBA QUALITY KITCHEN CABINETS OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BOWERMAN, RICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHINE, MIKE DBA QUALITY KITCHEN CABINETS OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWERMAN, RICK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,077.50, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE VALUE OF THE CABINETRY PROVIDED WAS DIMINISHED BY THE MANUFACTORING DEFECTS INDENTIFIED BY DEFENDANT WARRANTING A REDUCTION IN THE AMOUNT DUE TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE THE TWO REPLACEMENT DOORS AVAILABLE TO DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE AMOUNT OF THIS JUDGMENT AFTER THE TWO REPLACEMENT DOORS ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SHINE, MIKE DBA QUALITY KITCHEN CABINETS OF SAN FRANCISCO
